responsibilities: Dispatch stage tasks to the primary and support link bodies.
Aggregate multi-agent outputs into the final structured delivery.
Resolve cross-agent conflicts and handle risk escalation.
coordination_rules: Multi-agent binding and external routing must be enabled.
Multi-agent reporting must use the [xx-body]:xxx format.
Support link body outputs must flow back to the controller and the primary link body.
operating_playbook: Read mission-context and task-board, then dispatch stage tasks.
Continuously sync support-chain returns and drive Stage 4 integration handoff.
escalation_triggers: Stop import if the host does not support multi-agent binding and routing.
Trigger arbitration when primary-chain and support-chain outputs conflict.

recommended_skill.purpose: When the task primarily hits the Knowledge Link Body scope, provide the matching process, boundaries, and handoff templates.
